WRONG_PHASE: You can't do that right now.
NOT_CONNECTED: That's not connected to your roads.
BANK_EMPTY: The bank is out of that resource.
DECK_EMPTY: The development card deck is empty.
DEV_ALREADY_PLAYED: You've already played a development card this turn.
DEV_BOUGHT_THIS_TURN: You can't play a card you bought this turn.
BAD_DISCARD_COUNT: You discarded the wrong number of cards.
CANNOT_PLAY: You can't play that right now.
EXPANSION_NOT_AVAILABLE: That expansion isn't available in this game.
MODIFIER_INCOMPATIBLE: That modifier isn't compatible with the current game options.
MODIFIER_INVALID_CONFIG: A modifier setting is out of range:
BAD_TOKEN: Your session isn't valid. Try rejoining.
NOT_HOST: Only the host can do that.
NO_CITY_OWNED: You need at least one city.
IMPROVEMENT_MAX_LEVEL: That track is already at the top level.
KNIGHT_CAP: You're at the cap for that knight level.
KNIGHT_MAX_LEVEL: That knight can't be promoted further.
FORTRESS_REQUIRED: You need Politics level 3 (Fortress) for that.
ROBBER_LOCKED: The robber is locked until the first barbarian attack.
DEV_CARDS_DISABLED: Development cards are disabled in this game.
NOT_ELIGIBLE: You're not eligible to play that.
WALL_CAP: You're at the cap for city walls.
WALL_ALREADY_BUILT: That city already has a wall.
INVENTOR_RESTRICTED_NUMBER: Inventor can't relocate a 6 or 8 token.
BAD_GOLD_COUNT: You picked the wrong number of gold resources.
